# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent linkerd no mtls.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-service
  namespace: my-namespace
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: my-service

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-service
  port: 80
  tls:
    mode: "strict"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-namespace
      to:
        - operation:
            method: GET
      when:
        - key: request.header.authorization
          values: ["Bearer my-secure-token"]

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-other-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  service: my-other-service
  port: 80
  tls:
    mode: "strict"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: my-other-service-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespace: my-namespace
      to:
        - operation:
            method: POST
      when:
        - key: request.header.authorization
          values: ["Bearer my-secure-token"]
